use_cases: Displaying product carousels in e-commerce storefronts
Creating infinite scrolling image galleries with ruler navigation
Building portfolio showcases with timeline-style navigation
Adding visual progress indicators to content carousels
ai_summary: An interactive carousel component featuring a visual ruler with tick marks for navigation positioning. Uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and implements infinite scrolling by triplicating item arrays. Includes center and fifth-mark highlighting on the ruler with different heights and colors. Supports click-based navigation with Rewind and FastForward controls.
